data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case describes the feature but does not provide sufficient evidence to demonstrate that the override option is effectively available for preferred clients, leading to a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the override option for preferred clients to see full availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate override option for preferred clients
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that preferred clients can see full availability as required.
